description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and coverage. The build job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs tests with coverage, and uploads coverage artifacts. The coverage job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, downloads coverage artifacts, combines and annotates coverage data, and reports coverage metrics.
